app.name: Moon Chiild
app.long_description:
You've got the power to be his friend... on the Wii!
Hold the Wiimote sideways to play! (or use a GameCube controller)
Controls (Wiimote):
D-Pad - Move 2 - Jump/Shoot 1 - Use + - Exit Level
Controls (GameCube):
Left Stick/D-Pad - Move A - Jump/Shoot B - Use START - Exit Level
Original repo: https://github.com/TheFlowerVixen/MoonChild-Port
